k_staging_mechanism: REDUCE-axis per-token stage: klds[e].store(cache[...]).end(r) + UOp.barrier + klds.after(bar)[e] in compute (qk_flash_decode.py:214,253)
block_tile_kv_staging: Per-block stage of TK=16 tokens K+V into LDS via REDUCE stage loop (qk_flash_decode.py:975-1011, flash_block_tiled_xlane_score_pv_tile_whole_cache_kernel)
block_tile_g_constraint: G == WARPS == 4 required; 14B has G=5 -> ValueError (qk_flash_decode.py:963)
per_token_v_staging_reason: d=LOCAL axis in flash_partial_coop_vec already gives coalesced V reads; per-token LDS adds write+barrier with zero data reuse
full_split_prologue_reason: Block tile pattern IS expressible in UOp DSL (proven for G=4/8B), but 14B G=5 has no kernel variant; G=5 block tile is new kernel design work
reopen_condition: Build flash_block_tiled_g5_score_pv_kernel (WARPS=5 or G=5-compatible warp layout, TK=16 K+V LDS staging, online softmax for G=5, gate under DECODE_ATTN_BLOCK_TILE_G5=0)
corrects: LDS0 said EMITTER_BLOCKED (prologue_range_uop missing); PR1 shows the UOp pattern exists (block tile), blocker is G=5 shape gap, not a missing UOp
